title: Focus
author: Daniel Goleman
customHTML:
<svg viewBox="0 0 1600 2400" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%">
  <!-- A target / dartboard. 5 concentric circles, with the bullseye in red. 3 hairlines 'darts' land scattered around the center. -->
  <g transform="translate(800 1180)" fill="none">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="380" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="280" stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="1"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="180" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="90" stroke="#cccccc" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="30" fill="#fc1c46"/>
  </g>
  <!-- 3 'darts' — short angled hairlines, with feathered tails -->
  <g stroke="#ffffff" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <line x1="800" y1="1180" x2="700" y2="1280"/>
    <line x1="690" y1="1290" x2="660" y2="1320"/>
    <line x1="700" y1="1280" x2="660" y2="1320"/>
    <line x1="700" y1="1280" x2="685" y2="1300"/>
    <line x1="690" y1="1280" x2="675" y2="1295"/>
  </g>
  <g stroke="#4c4c4c" stroke-width="2" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round">
    <line x1="800" y1="1180" x2="900" y2="1080"/>
    <line x1="800" y1="1180" x2="700" y2="1080"/>
  </g>
  <!-- Annotation: scattered labels around the target indicating 'where attention goes' -->
  <g font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="500" fill="#4c4c4c" letter-spacing="0.18em">
    <text x="800" y="700" text-anchor="middle">DISTRACTION</text>
    <text x="400" y="1180" text-anchor="middle">DISTRACTION</text>
    <text x="1200" y="1180" text-anchor="middle">DISTRACTION</text>
    <text x="800" y="1640" text-anchor="middle">DISTRACTION</text>
  </g>
  <!-- whisper label inside red center -->
  <text x="800" y="1196" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Sui','Söhne','Inter',system-ui,sans-serif" font-size="11" font-weight="500" fill="#fc1c46" letter-spacing="0.04em" opacity="0.0">FOCUS</text>
</svg>
rationale: A dartboard/target dominates the cover: 5 concentric circles with a small RED bullseye at the center — the only chromatic element. Three hairlines suggest 'darts' scattered across the target, with surrounding 'DISTRACTION' labels. The 560px uppercase 'FOCUS' title is centered, weight 500 — the title literally IS the focal point. The visual thesis: focus is the small target in a field of distraction.
